# 🌅 Morning Digest — Monday, April 27, 2026

## 📬 Emails Needing Attention

**1.** jjohanni@lisinskifirm.com | *Accepted: Service Expansion Framework — Technology Assessment* | Urgency: Low | Jake Johanni accepted the meeting invite for this session — no action needed, but confirms attendance.

**2.** Internal sender | *Supplements Dashboards project* | Urgency: Low | Team member confirmed the 4th Supplements dashboard has been deployed; feedback is being incorporated gradually.

**3.** helpdesk@lisinskifirm.com | *Service Ticket [ID:0028314] — Edit access to supplements reports/dashboards folders* | Urgency: Low | Resolved ✅ — Helpdesk moved the supplements folder to Phase 2 and granted access to the three users you requested. Good to verify everything looks correct.

**4.** noreply@github.com | *[GitHub] A personal access token (classic) has been added to your account* | Urgency: Medium | Security notification — a new GitHub PAT was added to your account. If this was part of your Personal Dashboard setup, no action needed. If unexpected, review immediately.

**5.** noreply@github.com | *[GitHub] A third-party OAuth application has been added to your account* | Urgency: Medium | Another security notification related to a new OAuth app linked to your GitHub account. Same caveat — verify this is expected.

**6.** yumendonca@lisinskifirm.com | *Yuri OOO* | Urgency: Low | Yuri Mendonca is out of office today — flag for any items that need his coverage.

**7.** aos@lisinskifirm.com | *OOO — CO & ARG Holiday* | Urgency: Low | Multiple OOO alerts for Colombia, Argentina, Costa Rica, and US holidays today. A significant portion of the team may be unavailable — keep in mind for Sprint #10 planning.

*No emails from priority senders (Danny, Jessica, Eugenia, Larry, Raquel, Chelsea) in this window.*

---

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

**Team Sprint Planning Chat** — Your team had an active standup-style discussion yesterday afternoon. Key signals:
- You flagged that **Dashboards** will be delayed to Thursday (hypercare), **Scams** project should close this week, and **U-AOS** is pushed ~3 weeks (blocked on Dana).
- Mar Garcia reported: **TRACE** pushed to Sprint #11; **Court EAD/I-90/DACA** are with IT but pending response — she has already pushed on it. "Approval Copy of Camilo" is in the CoE bucket.
- **Both RFE Fix taskset and U-AOS are marked "at risk" for IT Capacity** per Camilo Vejarano.
- Jean Garcia shared that the firm is **likely moving off Asana to Smartsheet soon** — worth staying looped in.
- There was a deadline mentioned as being **"until today"** in the team chat — Jean flagged it urgently. Worth verifying what that deadline was before the Sprint #10 planning call.

**Santiago + Jhara Ochoa (1:1 chat)** — You checked in on a shared tool/code project. Jhara confirmed she has made **zero changes** to the main branch, so you are clear to work on it without conflicts. She was planning to look at it this week.

**Paralegal Dashboard** — You shared the completed paralegal dashboard link with Jess and with Mas for review/approval. Alan Soto acknowledged fixes were done. Action: await their feedback.

---

## 📅 Today's Agenda

*(All times in Colombia time, UTC-5)*

- **08:00 – 09:00** | Work on Supplements Dashboards *(personal focus block)*
- **09:00 – 09:30** | Claude Training | Mar, Jean, David, Ana, Jhara — Teams meeting | Prep note: likely the team training session on Claude/Cowork tools
- **09:30 – 10:30** | Fix Reports and Dashboards *(personal focus block)*
- **12:00 – 13:00** | Lunch
- **14:00 – 15:00** | Work on Supplements Dashboards *(second focus block)*
- **15:00 – 15:30** | IT Litify Sprint #10 Planning with Stakeholders | Large cross-functional meeting (60+ attendees incl. Danny Miller, Eugenia Barragan, Mar, Jean, Jhara, Camilo, and many others) | Prep: Review your sprint #10 items — Dashboards delay to Thursday, Scams closing this week, U-AOS deferred 3 weeks. Come ready to communicate these updates clearly.

---

## ⚡ Immediate Action

Two items to address first thing:

**1. Sprint #10 Planning (15:00 COL)** — Large stakeholder meeting with Danny Miller and Eugenia Barragan on the invite. Your timeline updates are solid, but double-check the **deadline Jean flagged as "until today"** in the team chat — confirm whether you own it before the call.

**2. GitHub Security Notifications** — Two security emails (new PAT + new OAuth app) landed on your account. If these were part of your Personal Dashboard setup last night, all good. If anything looks unexpected, review your GitHub security log before starting your morning work block.
